nodes.name: settings.local.json
nodes.summary: Claude Code local permissions configuration granting shell command access patterns for development, building, and testing workflows.

nodes.name: AGENTS.md
nodes.summary: Coding style guide and conventions for AI agents, covering naming, destructuring, variables, control flow, Drizzle schema definitions, and testing practices.

nodes.name: bunfig.toml
nodes.summary: Bun runtime configuration enforcing exact dependency versions and disabling test runs from the monorepo root.

nodes.name: CONTRIBUTING.md
nodes.summary: Comprehensive contributor guide covering development setup, building localcode, running API/web/desktop apps, PR expectations, trust/vouch system, and issue requirements.

nodes.name: memory-system-plan.md
nodes.summary: Architecture plan for a native memory system with database tables, auto-extraction from sessions, context injection, memory tools, and an extractor agent.

nodes.name: flake.nix
nodes.summary: Nix flake defining development shells, package overlays, and build outputs for aboocode CLI and desktop app across multiple platforms.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses Nix flake system with forEachSystem helper for cross-platform builds (aarch64/x86_64 on Linux and Darwin).

nodes.name: action.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub Action composite action definition that installs and runs opencode in CI, supporting model selection, agent configuration, OIDC auth, and custom trigger phrases.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Main GitHub Action entry point implementing issue commenting, PR review, code generation, git operations, and opencode SDK integration for automated AI-powered code review and issue resolution.

nodes.name: package.json
nodes.summary: Package manifest for the github action subpackage declaring dependencies on Octokit, GitHub Actions core, and the aboocode SDK.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Documentation for the aboocode GitHub Action covering features (issue explain/fix, PR review, code line review), installation, manual setup, and development/testing instructions.

nodes.name: publish
nodes.summary: Shell script that updates the 'latest' git tag to point at the most recent github-v* release tag.

nodes.name: release
nodes.summary: Shell script that bumps the GitHub Action version by incrementing the patch or minor number of the latest github-v* tag and pushes the new tag.

nodes.name: sst-env.d.ts
nodes.summary: Auto-generated SST environment type declaration providing TypeScript type safety for SST resource bindings.

nodes.name: tsconfig.json
nodes.summary: TypeScript compiler configuration for the github action subpackage specifying compilation target and module resolution settings.

nodes.name: app.ts
nodes.summary: SST infrastructure definition for the main API worker (Cloudflare Worker), docs website (Astro), and web app (static site), wiring secrets and domain configuration.

nodes.name: console.ts
nodes.summary: SST infrastructure definition for the console/admin application including PlanetScale database provisioning, authentication, Stripe webhook, and various backend services.

nodes.name: enterprise.ts
nodes.summary: SST infrastructure definition for the enterprise Teams app deployed as a SolidStart app on Cloudflare with R2 storage integration.

nodes.name: secret.ts
nodes.summary: Exports R2 storage access key secrets used by the enterprise infrastructure module.

nodes.name: stage.ts
nodes.summary: Defines stage-dependent domain names (opencode.ai / dev.opencode.ai) and DNS zone configuration shared across all infrastructure modules.

nodes.name: install
nodes.summary: Curl-installable shell script that detects platform/architecture, downloads the correct opencode binary with progress display, and adds it to PATH.

nodes.name: install.sh
nodes.summary: Local build-from-source installer that detects platform, checks for Bun, installs dependencies, compiles the binary, and places it in the target bin directory.

nodes.name: desktop.nix
nodes.summary: Nix derivation for building the aboocode Tauri desktop application with Rust/cargo-tauri, GTK4, and system library dependencies.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses rustPlatform.buildRustPackage with cargo-tauri for cross-platform desktop builds.

nodes.name: hashes.json
nodes.summary: Platform-specific content hashes for Nix node_modules fixed-output derivations, keyed by system architecture.

nodes.name: node_modules.nix
nodes.summary: Nix derivation that installs node_modules via Bun as a fixed-output derivation, providing reproducible dependency management for the build.

nodes.name: opencode.nix
nodes.summary: Nix derivation that builds the aboocode CLI binary using Bun's bundler with shell completion generation and binary wrapper setup.

nodes.name: createOpencode
nodes.summary: Creates and configures an opencode SDK client instance for use within the GitHub Action.

nodes.name: getAccessToken
nodes.summary: Obtains a GitHub App installation access token via OIDC exchange or direct GITHUB_TOKEN, handling both authentication strategies.

nodes.name: getUserPrompt
nodes.summary: Builds the user prompt text for the AI agent by combining issue/PR context, user comments, and file references into a structured message.

nodes.name: subscribeSessionEvents
nodes.summary: Subscribes to opencode session events and streams status updates as GitHub comment edits for real-time progress visibility.

nodes.name: chat
nodes.summary: Sends a chat message to the opencode session with file attachments and awaits the AI response.

nodes.name: configureGit
nodes.summary: Configures git credentials and user identity for the GitHub Action bot to push commits.

nodes.name: fetchPR
nodes.summary: Fetches comprehensive pull request data via GitHub GraphQL API including commits, files, reviews, and comments for AI context building.

nodes.name: fetchIssue
nodes.summary: Fetches issue details and comment history via GitHub GraphQL API for AI context.

nodes.name: assertPermissions
nodes.summary: Validates that the commenting user has sufficient repository permissions (write, maintain, or admin) to trigger the AI agent.

nodes.name: createPR
nodes.summary: Creates a new GitHub pull request from a generated branch after the AI agent makes code changes.

nodes.name: download_with_progress
nodes.summary: Downloads the opencode binary archive with a progress bar, supporting both curl and wget with fallback behavior.

nodes.name: download_and_install
nodes.summary: Orchestrates the download, extraction, and installation of the opencode binary to the user's system.

nodes.name: detect_platform
nodes.summary: Detects the operating system and CPU architecture to determine the correct build target for compilation.

nodes.name: build_binary
nodes.summary: Compiles the aboocode binary from source using Bun's build system for the detected platform.

nodes.name: install_binary
nodes.summary: Copies the compiled binary to the installation directory with proper permissions and PATH configuration.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Main entry point that orchestrates the full build-from-source installation pipeline: detect platform, check prerequisites, build, and install.
